changes.value:
Replace all coreml-rs usage in model.rs with the new coreml.rs wrapper. Public API unchanged.

- [ ] Replace `use coreml_rs::...` with `use crate::coreml::CoreMLModel`
- [ ] Remove `use ndarray::{Array2, ArrayD}`
- [ ] Change `Inner.model` from `Option<CoreMLModelWithState>` to `Option<CoreMLModel>`
- [ ] Rewrite `load_model()` to use `CoreMLModel::load()` and probe embedding dim
- [ ] Rewrite `embed_impl()` to pass `Vec<i32>` directly to wrapper, get `Vec<f32>` back
- [ ] Delete `mlarray_to_f32()` helper
- [ ] Add `mod coreml;` to lib.rs
- [ ] Verify TextEmbedder trait impl still compiles
- [ ] cargo check -p ane-embedding
Rewrite model.rs to use coreml wrapper instead of coreml-rs
